title: fast-autototem
description: A simple autototem mod. If your totem pops in your offhand, it automatically gets replaced. The mod can be opted out on the server side.  NOTE: THIS MOD IS NOT MEANT TO BE USED FOR BREAKING ANY SERVER RULES
body: A simple autototem mod. If your totem pops in your offhand, it automatically gets replaced. The mod can be opted out on the server side. and is undetected on big anticheat NOTE: THIS MOD IS NOT MEANT TO BE USED FOR BREAKING ANY SERVER RULES
